---
name: Wrong answer / bad question
about: Report a question that has a wrong correct answer, a misleading explanation, or a poor distractor.
title: "[question] "
labels: ["question-quality"]
---

**Question id**
(e.g., `kf-ctrl-012`. You can find it in the saved session JSON under `%LOCALAPPDATA%\kcna\history\` on Windows, or the equivalent user-data path on macOS/Linux.)

**Session id (optional)**
(If you ran into this during an exam — from `kcna stats list`.)

**Question text**

> Paste the stem here.

**Options as shown**
- (a) ...
- (b) ...
- (c) ...
- (d) ...

**What the tool says is correct**
(letter)

**What you think is correct**
(letter, and why)

**Source / reference**
(Link to `kubernetes.io`, CNCF docs, or a project's README that supports your claim.)

**Additional context**
(Anything else — edge cases, curriculum version, etc.)
